== Notes for [[Item:Q3335|Q3335]] ==

Travelled to the New World in 1514, perhaps to Santo Domingo or Puerto Rico.

http://www.archivesportaleurope.net/ead-display/-/ead/pl/aicode/ES-41091-AGI10/type/fa/id/ES-AGI-41091-UD-1859528/unitid/ES-AGI-41091-UD-1859528+-+ES-AGI-41091-UD-5505546/search/0/Polanco

http://www.archivesportaleurope.net/ead-display/-/ead/pl/aicode/ES-41091-AGI10/type/fa/id/ES-41091-AGI-UD-1859528/unitid/ES-41091-AGI-UD-1859528+-+ES-41091-AGI-UD-5505546/search/0/Francisco+de+Medina+Polanco

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADAC4ADD1EFBBFA9822EF79916C6506
geni:6000000076393575940


[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
